steps.title: Split the absolute value
steps.content:
The equation $|x-7|=10$ means the expression inside the absolute value is $10$ units from $0$:
$$x-7=10\quad \text{or}\quad x-7=-10$$

steps.title: Add the two solutions
steps.content:
Solve and add the two values:
$$x=17\quad \text{or}\quad x=-3$$
$$17+(-3)=14$$The answer is B.
